tasks.label: ROS2: 编译并刷新 IntelliSense
args: source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && if [ -f '${workspaceFolder}/install/setup.bash' ]; then source '${workspaceFolder}/install/setup.bash'; fi && cd '${workspaceFolder}' && colcon build --packages-select tensorrt_detect_msgs position_prior tensorrt_detect --symlink-install --cmake-args -DCMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS=ON && jq -s 'add' build/position_prior/compile_commands.json build/tensorrt_detect/compile_commands.json > build/compile_commands.json
tasks.detail: 构建 ROS2 包并合并 position_prior 与 tensorrt_detect 的 compile_commands.json。
